HealthcheckRiskRule.Rationale: Presence of Admin accounts which do not have the flag "This account is sensitive and cannot be delegated": 4
The native administrator account has been used recently: 0 day(s) ago
The LAN Manager Authentication Level allows the use of NTLMv1 or LM.
Last AD backup has been performed 38 day(s) ago
LAPS doesn't seem to be installed
Policy where the password length is less than 8 characters: 1
The spooler service is remotely accessible from 1 DC
The audit policy on domain controllers does not collect key events.
Non-admin users can add up to 10 computer(s) to a domain
Number of admins not in Protected Users: 4
The group Schema Admins is not empty: 1 account(s)
Hardened Paths have been modified to lower the security level
A LDAP authentication without signature enforcement was allowed
WSUS is configured with unencrypted HTTP instead of HTTPS
Presence of non-supported versions of Windows 10 or Windows 11 = 1 editions ( 3 active computers)
The subnet declaration is incomplete [3 IP of DC not found in declared subnets]
AES is not enabled on all trusts
Number of accounts which have never expiring passwords: 8
At least one trusted certificate found has a relatively weak RSA key [1]
No password policy for service accounts found (MinimumPasswordLength>=20)
OU without the accidental deletion protection have been found
Anonymous Binding to the rootDse is enabled
Presence of service accounts without AES support = 1
The PreWin2000 compatible group contains "Authenticated Users"
Not all possible Defender ASR mitigations are in Block or Warn mode
Verify Kerberos Armoring is enabled on clients and the domain functional level is at least Windows Server 2012
Number of admin account with an email address defined: 3
Verify Kerberos Armoring is enabled on DCs and the domain functional level is at least Windows Server 2012
No GPO has been found which implements NetCease
The PowerShell audit configuration is not fully enabled.
No GPO has been found which disables LLMNR or at least one GPO does enable it explicitly
It is possible for scripts engine used by hackers to connect directly to the Internet
The GPO are not pushing recommended configuration for Terminal Services
Authenticated Users can create DNS records
Some script extensions, used in phishing, can be directly run by double clicking on it
DsHeuristics has not been set to enable the mitigation for CVE-2021-42291
